setup.welcome_desc: CIRIS jẹ́ olùrànlọ́wọ́ AI tó ní ìwà-rere tó ń ṣiṣẹ́ lórí ẹ̀rọ rẹ. Àwọn ìbánisọ̀rọ̀ àti dátà rẹ wà ní ìkọ̀kọ̀.
setup.prefs_desc: Ràn CIRIS lọ́wọ́ láti bá ọ sọ̀rọ̀ ní èdè tí o fẹ́ràn. Ibùdó jẹ́ ìfẹ́, ó sì ràn lọ́wọ́ láti pèsè àyíká tó bá mu.
setup.prefs_location_hint: Pín níwọ̀n bí o ṣe fẹ́. Èyí ràn CIRIS lọ́wọ́ láti lóye àyíká rẹ.
setup.prefs_country_hint: bí àpẹẹrẹ, Ethiopia, United States, Japan
setup.prefs_city_hint: bí àpẹẹrẹ, Addis Ababa, San Francisco, Tokyo
setup.prefs_location_search_hint: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí í tẹ orúkọ ìlú kan...
setup.llm_desc: Ṣètò bí CIRIS ṣe máa sopọ̀ mọ́ àwọn iṣẹ́ AI.
setup.confirm_desc: Ṣàyẹ̀wò ìṣètò rẹ kí o sì parí ìṣètò.
setup.complete_message: Ìṣètò ti parí dáradára. Ó ń bẹ̀rẹ̀ olùṣàmúlò aṣojú...
setup.error_runtime: Àsìkò-ṣiṣẹ́ kò sí - kò lè parí ìṣètò

agent.greeting: Báwo! Báwo ni mo ṣe lè ràn ọ́ lọ́wọ́ lónìí?
agent.thinking: Jẹ́ kí n ronú nípa èyí...
agent.error_generic: Mo pàdé ìṣòro kan nígbà tí mo ń ṣe ìbéèrè rẹ. Jọ̀wọ́ gbìyànjú lẹ́ẹ̀kan síi.
agent.error_timeout: Ìbéèrè náà pẹ́ jù. Jọ̀wọ́ gbìyànjú lẹ́ẹ̀kan síi.
agent.defer_to_wa: Mo nílò láti bá Aláṣẹ Ọlọ́gbọ́n sọ̀rọ̀ nípa èyí. Màá padà bá ọ sọ̀rọ̀.
agent.no_permission: Mi ò ní àṣẹ láti ṣe bẹ́ẹ̀.
agent.clarify_request: Ṣé o lè ṣàlàyé ohun tí o túmọ̀ sí?
agent.defer_check_panel: Aṣojú yàn láti fi lélẹ̀, ṣàyẹ̀wò pánẹ́ẹ̀lì Aláṣẹ Ọlọ́gbọ́n tí o bá jẹ́ olùmúlò ìṣètò
agent.no_send_permission: O kò ní àṣẹ láti fi ìránṣẹ́ ránṣẹ́ sí aṣojú yìí.
agent.credit_blocked: Ìbánisọ̀rọ̀ ti dí nípasẹ̀ ìlànà kírẹ́dítì.
agent.billing_error: Àṣìṣe iṣẹ́ ìsanwó LLM. Jọ̀wọ́ ṣàyẹ̀wò àkọọ́lẹ̀ rẹ tàbí gbìyànjú lẹ́ẹ̀kan síi.
agent.new_messages_arrived: Aṣojú parí iṣẹ́ ṣùgbọ́n àwọn ìránṣẹ́ tuntun dé tí a kò sọ̀rọ̀ sí
agent.restarted_stale_task: Mo tún bẹ̀rẹ̀ nígbà tí mo ń ṣe ìbéèrè rẹ. Iṣẹ́ tẹ́lẹ̀ ti parí fúnra rẹ̀. Jọ̀wọ́ tún ìránṣẹ́ rẹ fi ránṣẹ́ tí o bá ṣì nílò èsì.

dma.pdma_header: Ìwọ jẹ́ apá ìrònú ìwà-rere kan ti ètò AI CIRIS tí Àdéhùn CIRIS ń ṣàkóso.
dma.pdma_task: Iṣẹ́ rẹ ni láti ṣe ìṣirò ìwà-rere ti àwọn ìránṣẹ́ olùmúlò nípa lílo Algorithm Ìpinnu Ìlànà (PDMA).
dma.pdma_principles_intro: PDMA ń papọ̀ àwọn Ìlànà Ìpìlẹ̀ CIRIS mẹ́fà wọ̀nyí:
dma.pdma_do_good: Ṣe Rere (Ìwùrí): Mú kí àwọn ẹ̀dá aláyè máa gbòórò; mú àwọn èsì rere pọ̀ sí i.
dma.pdma_avoid_harm: Yẹra Fún Ìpalára (Àì-ìpalára): Dín àwọn èsì búburú kù tàbí pa wọ́n rẹ́; yẹra fún ìpalára tó burú, tí kò ṣeé padà.
dma.pdma_act_ethically: Ṣe Déédé (Ìwàpẹ̀lẹ́): Lo ìrònú tó ṣí sílẹ̀, tó ṣeé yẹ̀wò; ṣe ìbáramu àti ìforúkọsílẹ̀.
dma.pdma_be_honest: Jẹ́ Olódodo (Ìgbóyà àti Ṣíṣí Sílẹ̀): Pèsè ìròyìn tòótọ́, tó yé ni; sọ àìdájú kedere.
dma.pdma_respect_autonomy: Bọ̀wọ̀ Fún Òmìnira: Mọ̀ọ́mọ̀ àṣẹ àti ìyì àwọn ẹ̀dá aláyè; tọ́jú agbára ìpinnu-ara-ẹni.
dma.pdma_ensure_fairness: Rii Dájú Pé Ó Tọ́ (Ìdájọ́): Pín àǹfàní àti ẹrù déédé; rii àti dín ìṣègbè kù.
dma.pdma_actions_intro: Ètò náà ní àwọn iṣẹ́ olùṣàkóso mẹ́wàá tó ṣeé ṣe:
dma.pdma_external_actions: Àwọn iṣẹ́ òde: wo, sọ, irinṣẹ́
dma.pdma_control_responses: Àwọn ìdáhùn ìṣàkóso: kọ̀, ronú jinlẹ̀, fi lélẹ̀
dma.pdma_memory_operations: Àwọn iṣẹ́ ìrántí: rán tí, rántí, gbàgbé
dma.pdma_subject_id_text: ṢÁÁJÚ ìṣirò ìwà-rere èyíkéyìí, o GBỌDỌ̀ dá ìdánimọ̀ kedere: 1. Ta ni a ń ṣe ìṣirò ìwà-rere iṣẹ́ rẹ̀? 2. Iṣẹ́ tàbí ìwà wo ni a ń ṣe ìdájọ́ rẹ̀?
dma.pdma_proportionality_text: Nígbà tí o bá ń ṣàyẹ̀wò àwọn ìdáhùn sí àìtọ́ tàbí ìpalára tí a rí: 1. Kí ni ìpalára/ẹ̀ṣẹ̀ àkọ́kọ́? 2. Kí ni ìdáhùn tí a dábàá? 3. Ṣé ìdáhùn náà BÁRA ìpalára àkọ́kọ́ MU?
dma.pdma_relational_text: Ṣe ìdọ́gba láàárín òmìnira àti àwọn ojúṣe ìbáṣepọ̀. Àwọn ara ìdílé, ọ̀rẹ́ tímọ́tímọ́, àti ìbáṣepọ̀ ìgbẹ́kẹ̀lé ń dá àwọn ojúṣe ìbáṣepọ̀.
dma.csdma_role: Ìwọ jẹ́ aṣojú Ìṣirò Ọgbọ́n Inú fún ètò AI CIRIS kan. Iṣẹ́ rẹ ni láti ṣàyẹ̀wò èrò kan fún ìbáramu rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú òye ọgbọ́n-inú gbogbogbò, nípa ṣíṣe àkíyèsí òtítọ́ ti ara àti àyíká dígítà/fọ́nrán.
dma.csdma_digital_context: ÀYÍKÁ PÀTÀKÌ: Aṣojú yìí ń ṣiṣẹ́ nípasẹ̀ Discord, API, tàbí CLI. Ìbánisọ̀rọ̀ dígítà, ìbáṣepọ̀ fọ́nrán, àti iṣẹ́ sọ́fìtíwíà jẹ́ ìwà DÉÉDÉ àti TÍ A NRÈTÍ.
dma.csdma_reality_check: ÌṢÀYẸ̀WÒ ÌDÚRÓ ÒTÍTỌ́: Ṣé àwọn nǹkan, ènìyàn, tàbí ìpò pòórá, farahàn, tàbí yí padà láì sí ìdí tàbí ìdí?
dma.csdma_anti_urgency: ÌṢIRÒ ÈÉKÉ-ÌKÁNJǗ: Ṣé èrò náà ní àwọn àmì ìkánjú tó lè fòrí ìrònú kọjá lọ?
dma.csdma_temporal_causal: ÌṢÀYẸ̀WÒ ÌRÒNÚ ÀSÌKÒ/IDÍ: Lo ìtúpalẹ̀ ọgbọ́n tó mú gan-an sí àwọn ìdí, àwáwí, àti ẹ̀wọ̀n ìrònú.
dma.idma_role: O ń lo àwọn ìlànà Ìtúpalẹ̀ Ìṣubú Ìbáramu (CCA) láti ṣàyẹ̀wò ìdára ìrònú aṣojú. Iṣẹ́ rẹ ni láti rii àwọn ìlànà ìrònú aláìlágbára tó lè tọ́ka sí àwọn ọ̀nà ìkùnà tí ìbáṣepọ̀ ń wa.
dma.idma_keff_intro: k_eff (Àwọn Oríṣun Ọ̀tọ̀tọ̀ Tó Mú): Àgbékalẹ̀: k_eff = k / (1 + ρ(k-1))
dma.idma_fragile: k_eff < 2 = ALÁÌLÁGBÁRA - ìgbẹ́kẹ̀lé oríṣun-kan tó lewu
dma.idma_healthy: k_eff >= 2 = ÀLÁÁFÍÀ - ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ ojú òye ọ̀tọ̀tọ̀ tòótọ́
dma.idma_echo_chamber: Bí ρ → 1, k_eff → 1 láì ka k (ìṣubú àyè-ìdarí)
dma.idma_phase_chaos: RÚDURÙDU: Ìròyìn tó lòdì ara wọn, kò sí ìsopọ̀ tó yé ni
dma.idma_phase_healthy: ÀLÁÁFÍÀ: Ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ ojú òye oríṣiríṣi, ìsopọ̀ ṣeé ṣe
dma.idma_phase_rigidity: LÍLE: Ìtàn kan ṣoṣo ń jẹ ọba, kò sí ìkọ̀sílẹ̀ - àyè-ìdarí
dma.idma_closing: Nígbà tí o bá ní àìdájú nípa ọ̀tọ̀tọ̀ oríṣun, ṣọ́ra kí o sì ṣe ìfúrasí ìbáṣepọ̀ gíga. Àmì aláìlágbára KÌÍ túmọ̀ sí pé ìrònú náà jẹ́ àṣìṣe - ó túmọ̀ sí pé ìrònú náà yẹ kó gba ìṣàyẹ̀wò àfikún.
dma.dsdma_professional: ÀWỌN ÌDÍDÌ IPỌ̀ ỌJỌ́GBỌ́N: Àwọn ojúṣe ìgbẹ́kẹ̀lé, àwọn ojúṣe oògùn, àwọn ojúṣe òfin, àwọn ojúṣe ẹ̀kọ́.
dma.dsdma_social: ÀWỌN ÌLÀNÀ ÒFIN ÀWÙJỌ: Àwọn àwáwí tí kìí ṣe láti máa yí ẹ̀bi padà; ìlànà ẹ̀bùn yẹ kó bá ra mu; àwọn òfin ìlejò wà.
dma.dsdma_workplace: ÌBÁṢEPỌ̀ IBIṢẸ́/ILÉ-ÌWÉ: Àwọn èrè yẹ kó bá ìlọ́sí òpin mu; àwọn ìrètí ìpèle-ìbẹ̀rẹ̀ wà.
dma.dsdma_developmental: ÀYÍKÁ ÌDÀGBÀSÓKÈ/ÀṢÀ: Àwọn ìrètí tó yẹ fún ọjọ́-orí; àwọn àkíyèsí ìpele-ìgbésí-ayé.
dma.aspdma_header: Ìwọ ni aṣàyẹ̀wò Yíyàn-Iṣẹ́ CIRIS. Tí a bá ti fún ọ ní àwọn èsì PDMA, CSDMA àti DSDMA, yan iṣẹ́ olùṣàkóso kan.
dma.aspdma_closing: Rántí àwọn ìlànà CIRIS ju ìfẹ́ràn ara-ẹni lọ.
dma.aspdma_language_matching: ÌBÁṢEPỌ̀ ÈDÈ: Nígbà tí o bá ń kọ speak_content, dáhùn ní èdè kan náà tí olùmúlò fi kọ̀wé. Tí olùmúlò bá kọ̀wé ní Amharic, dáhùn ní Amharic. Tí wọ́n bá kọ̀wé ní Spanish, dáhùn ní Spanish. Bá èdè olùmúlò mu àyàfi tí wọ́n bá béèrè èdè mìíràn kedere. Tí ìwé àkọsílẹ̀ olùmúlò bá sọ èdè tí wọ́n fẹ́ràn, bọ̀wọ̀ fún ìfẹ́ràn yẹn.
dma.tsaspdma_role: O ń ṣàyẹ̀wò iṣẹ́ IRINṢẸ́ kan tí ASPDMA yàn. O ní ÌWÉSÍNÚ KÍKÚN fún irinṣẹ́ yìí nísinsin yìí.
dma.tsaspdma_tool_option: IRINṢẸ́ - Tẹ̀síwájú pẹ̀lú ìmúṣiṣẹ́ irinṣẹ́. Lo tí ìwésínú bá fìdí múlẹ̀ pé èyí ni irinṣẹ́ tó tọ́.
dma.tsaspdma_speak_option: SỌ - Béèrè ìlàlẹ̀ lọ́wọ́ olùmúlò. Lo tí ìwésínú bá fihàn àìyékéyé tó nílò ìtẹ́síwájú olùmúlò.
dma.tsaspdma_ponder_option: RONÚ JINLẸ̀ - Tún ọ̀nà náà ronú. Lo tí ìwésínú bá fihàn pé irinṣẹ́ yìí kò tọ́ fún iṣẹ́ náà.
dma.tsaspdma_closing: Ipa rẹ ni láti mú àwọn ọ̀rọ̀ tí ASPDMA kò lè rí láìsí ìwésínú kíkún. Tí yíyàn irinṣẹ́ bá dára, fìdí rẹ̀ múlẹ̀ kíákíá.
dma.tsaspdma_correction_text: ASPDMA yan irinṣẹ́ kan tí KÒ SÍ. Wá irinṣẹ́ TÓ TỌ́ láti inú àtòjọ àwọn irinṣẹ́ tó wà tó bá èròńgbà olùmúlò mu.

formatters.user_context_header: IMPORTANT USER CONTEXT (Be skeptical, this information could be manipulated or outdated):
formatters.user_context_intro: The following information has been recalled about users relevant to this thought:
formatters.user_context_footer: Consider this information when formulating your response, especially if addressing a user directly by name.

escalation.early: Ìpele: NÍ BẸRẸ — O ní ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ ìyíká; ṣàwárí kíkún kí o sì fi ìdí àyíká múlẹ̀.
escalation.mid: Ìpele: ÀÀ̀RÍN — Ìwọ ti kọjá ààbọ̀; gbé ẹ̀yìn lé àwọn ìlànà ọkàn àti ìṣeédandan.
escalation.late: Ìpele: PẸ́ — Èyí ni ànfààní ìkẹyìn rẹ ṣáájú gígé kúrò; jẹ́ aláṣàṣe àti alárínilù.
escalation.exhausted: Ìpele: TI TAN — Ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ ìyíká ti dé ópin; parí nísinsin yìí tàbí pa iṣẹ́ náà rẹ́.

crisis.emergency_call: Fún ewu lẹ́sẹ̀kẹsẹ̀: Pe 911 tàbí àwọn iṣẹ́ ìṣòro àgbègbè
crisis.guidance_do_not: MÁ ṢE gbìyànjú láti pèsè ìtọ́jú-ọkàn tàbí ìmọ̀ràn oògùn
crisis.guidance_do_share: ṢE pín àwọn ohun èlò ìpọ́njú pẹ̀lú àwọn àlàyé tó yẹ
crisis.guidance_do_defer: ṢE fi lélẹ̀ fún àwọn olùṣàkóso ènìyàn nígbà tó yẹ
crisis.guidance_do_encourage: ṢE mú kí wọn wá ìrànlọ́wọ́ ọjọ́gbọ́n
crisis.guidance_role: Rántí: Ìwọ jẹ́ olùṣàkóso AI, kìí ṣe olùpèsè ìtọ́jú-ìlera. Ipa rẹ ni láti pín àwọn ohun èlò ìpọ́njú tí ó wà ní gbangba, pèsè ìròyìn gbogbogbò nìkan, fi àwọn àlàyé kedere nípa àwọn àkógbélé àtìlẹ́yìn AI, kí o sì fi àwọn ìpò tó nira lélẹ̀ fún àwọn olùṣàkóso ènìyàn.
crisis.guidance_max: Ìmúlò tó ga jùlọ: Pèsè àwọn ohun èlò ìpọ́njú pẹ̀lú àwọn àlàyé kí o sì fi lélẹ̀ fún ènìyàn.

prompts.engine_overview: ÀKÓJỌ Ẹ̀RỌ: Ẹ̀rọ CIRIS ń ṣe iṣẹ́ kan nípasẹ̀ ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀ àwọn Èrò. Gbogbo iṣẹ́ olùṣàkóso àyàfi IṢẸ́_TI_PARÍ máa ń ṣe Èrò tuntun fún ìṣe tó bá yọrí. Yíyàn IṢẸ́_TI_PARÍ máa ń sàmì iṣẹ́ náà pé ó ti parí kò sì ṣẹ̀dá Èrò tuntun.

handlers.speak_failed: Kùnà láti fi ìdáhùn aṣojú ránṣẹ́. A kò lè fi ìránṣẹ́ náà ránṣẹ́ sí ọ̀nà náà.
handlers.speak_success: SỌ TI ṢE ÀṢEYỌRÍ! Ìránṣẹ́ ti ránṣẹ́. Sísọ lẹ́ẹ̀mẹ́jì lórí iṣẹ́ kan kò wúlò - tí o kò bá ní ohun tuntun láti fi kún, lo IṢẸ́_TI_PARÍ. Àwọn ìránṣẹ́ tuntun olùmúlò máa ṣẹ̀dá àwọn iṣẹ́ tuntun fúnra wọn.
handlers.defer_message: Èrò tí a fi lélẹ̀. Ìdí: {reason}
handlers.forget_success: A ti gbàgbé kọ́kọ́rọ́ náà nínú ìrántí dáradára. Tí iṣẹ́ náà bá ti yanjú nísinsin yìí, ìgbésẹ̀ tókàn lè jẹ́ láti sàmì iṣẹ́ òbí pé ó parí pẹ̀lú PARÍ_IṢẸ́.
handlers.forget_failure: Kùnà láti gbàgbé kọ́kọ́rọ́ náà nínú ìrántí.
handlers.forget_denied: Iṣẹ́ GBÀGBÉ kọ̀: Àṣẹ WA nílò
handlers.forget_not_permitted: A kò fàyè gba iṣẹ́ GBÀGBÉ
handlers.memorize_success: RÁN TÍ TI PARÍ - Ìròyìn ti pamọ́ sínú àwòrán ìrántí dáradára.
handlers.task_complete_wakeup_blocked: ÌDÍDÌ ÌPARÍ IṢẸ́ JÍ: O gbìyànjú láti sàmì iṣẹ́ jí pé ó parí láì kọ́kọ́ parí iṣẹ́ SỌ. Gbogbo ìgbésẹ̀ jí nílò kí o SỌ ìfìdímúlẹ̀ tòótọ́ ṣáájú kí o to sàmì iṣẹ́ náà pé ó parí.
handlers.ponder_early: Tẹ̀síwájú láti ṣe ìlọsíwájú. Ronú nípa ìdáhùn ẹrí-ọkàn tó wà lókè.
handlers.ponder_mid: O ti lọ síwájú nínú iṣẹ́ yìí. Ronú nípa: 1) Ṣé iṣẹ́ náà ti fẹ́rẹ̀ parí? 2) Ṣé o lè fara dá àwọn ìṣòro ẹrí-ọkàn pẹ̀lú ọ̀nà tí a tún ṣe? 3) O ní àwọn iṣẹ́ {remaining} tókù.
handlers.ponder_late: O ń súnmọ́ ìdí àwọn iṣẹ́. Ronú nípa: 1) Ṣé o lè parí pẹ̀lú iṣẹ́ kan síi? 2) Ṣé IṢẸ́_TI_PARÍ yẹ? 3) Tí o bá nílò àwọn iṣẹ́ síi, ẹnìkan lè béèrè kí o tẹ̀síwájú.
handlers.ponder_final: IṢẸ́ ÌPARÍ. O yẹ kí o yàn: 1) IṢẸ́_TI_PARÍ - Tí iṣẹ́ náà bá ti parí nípa pàtàkì. 2) FI LÉLẸ̀ - Fún àwọn ìṣòro ìwà-rere tàbí àwọn ọ̀rọ̀ àṣẹ nìkan (KÌÍ ṢE àwọn àṣìṣe ìmọ̀-ẹ̀rọ). Àkíyèsí: Ẹnìkan lè béèrè kí o tẹ̀síwájú fún àwọn iṣẹ́ 7 síi.

errors.auth_personal_install_observer_blocked: Èyí jẹ́ ìgbékalẹ̀ CIRIS ti ara-ẹni. Ẹni tó ni rẹ̀ nìkan ló lè wọlé. Tí ìwọ bá jẹ́ ẹni tó ni rẹ̀, jọ̀wọ́ lo àkọọ́lẹ̀ kan náà tí o lò nígbà ìṣètò.
errors.insufficient_permissions: Àwọn àṣẹ kò tó. Ó nílò ipa {role} tàbí tó ga jù bẹ́ẹ̀ lọ.
errors.password_changed: A ti yí ọ̀rọ̀-aṣínà padà dáradára
errors.config_updated: A ti ṣe àyípadà ìṣètò dáradára

wallet.tool_send_desc: Send money to a recipient via crypto (USDC) or fiat (mobile money) providers
wallet.tool_request_desc: Create a payment request/invoice that others can pay
wallet.tool_statement_desc: Get account balance, transaction history, and account details
wallet.send_quick_start: Send money: send_money recipient='0x1234...' amount=10 currency='USDC'
wallet.send_detail: Send money to any recipient using the appropriate payment provider.
wallet.currency_usdc: USDC, ETH - x402 (crypto on Base L2)
wallet.currency_etb: ETB - Chapa (Ethiopian Birr via Telebirr/CBE Birr)
wallet.recipient_crypto: Crypto (x402): EVM address (0x...) or ENS name
wallet.tx_flow: Currency determines provider. Provider validates recipient. DMA pipeline evaluates the transaction. Transaction is signed and submitted. Result includes transaction_id and confirmation.
wallet.gotcha_irreversible: Transactions are irreversible. Once confirmed, crypto transactions cannot be reversed. Fiat may have dispute mechanisms.
wallet.gotcha_attestation: x402 provider requires minimum attestation level. Degraded attestation reduces limits.
wallet.gotcha_verify: Confirm recipient address/phone with user. Verify amount. Provide transaction ID to user. Log transaction for audit.
wallet.dma_when_not: When recipient has not been explicitly confirmed by the user. When amount seems unusual or unexpected.
wallet.dma_ethical: Verify recipient identity before sending. Confirm amount with user. Check for duplicate transactions.
wallet.request_quick_start: Request payment: request_money amount=0.10 currency='USDC' description='API task'
wallet.request_detail: Create a payment request/invoice that can be paid by others.
wallet.request_use_cases: API endpoint payment (402 Payment Required). Service fees. Contributor invoices. Donation requests.
wallet.request_returns: Returns a PaymentRequest with: request_id, checkout_url, status (pending/paid/expired), expires_at.
wallet.request_crypto_note: x402: Returns payment details for X-PAYMENT header. No checkout_url. Instant verification via blockchain.
wallet.request_fiat_note: Chapa: Returns checkout_url for Telebirr/CBE Birr/Bank. Payer completes payment on Chapa's page. Callback webhook on completion.
wallet.request_gotcha: Checkout URL is provider-specific. x402 doesn't use checkout URLs. Fiat providers return URLs.
wallet.request_dma: Payment requests should be for legitimate services rendered
wallet.statement_detail: Retrieve account information including balance, transaction history, and details.
wallet.statement_balance: Balance: available (spendable), pending (incoming but not confirmed), total (available + pending)
wallet.statement_history: History: Recent transactions (sends, receives), transaction IDs, timestamps and status
wallet.statement_provider_select: Omit provider_params: Query all. provider='x402': Only crypto. provider='chapa': Only Ethiopian. provider='all': Explicitly all.
wallet.statement_privacy: Account details may include sensitive information. Only request details when needed.
wallet.statement_dma: Balance and history reveal financial activity. Handle with appropriate privacy.
wallet.error_no_signing: Cannot send: no signing capability (receive-only mode). Ensure CIRISVerify is initialized with a key.

navigation.tool_geocode_desc: Convert an address or place name to geographic coordinates (latitude/longitude)
navigation.tool_reverse_desc: Convert geographic coordinates to an address or place name
navigation.tool_route_desc: Calculate driving route between two locations with distance and duration
navigation.geocode_quick_start: Provide an address or place name to get latitude/longitude coordinates. Use these coordinates with weather tools or for route planning.
navigation.geocode_when: When you need to find the coordinates of a location by name or address
navigation.geocode_formats: Full address, place name, city name, or landmark
navigation.geocode_response: latitude/longitude: Coordinates in decimal degrees. display_name: Full formatted address. type: Location type. importance: Relevance score.
navigation.geocode_rate_limit: This tool uses OpenStreetMap Nominatim which has a 1 request/second limit. Multiple rapid requests will be automatically throttled.
navigation.gotcha_ambiguous: Common place names may return unexpected results. Be specific (include city/country) for accurate results.
navigation.reverse_when: When you have coordinates and need to find the address or place name
navigation.route_when: When you need to calculate distance and travel time between two locations
navigation.route_disclaimer: Travel times are estimates. Always follow traffic laws and check current conditions.
navigation.error_missing_coords: Missing required parameters: latitude and longitude
navigation.error_missing_endpoints: Missing required parameters: start and end
navigation.error_route_failed: Could not calculate route between locations

weather.tool_current_desc: Get current weather conditions for a location (temperature, wind, conditions)
weather.tool_forecast_desc: Get weather forecast for a location (upcoming conditions)
weather.tool_alerts_desc: Get active weather alerts for a location (warnings, watches, advisories)
weather.current_quick_start: Provide latitude and longitude coordinates to get current weather. Uses NOAA (US) with OpenWeatherMap fallback for international locations.
weather.current_when: When you need current weather conditions at a specific location
weather.forecast_when: When you need weather forecast for planning ahead
weather.alerts_when: When you need to check for severe weather warnings or alerts
weather.data_sources: NOAA (primary): US National Weather Service - most accurate for US locations. OpenWeatherMap (fallback): Global coverage, requires API key.
weather.response_fields: temperature, wind_speed/wind_direction, conditions (short description), detailed (full forecast), precipitation_chance.
weather.gotcha_us_only: NOAA only covers US locations. International locations require OpenWeatherMap API key.
weather.gotcha_coords_required: You must provide coordinates, not city names. Use navigation:geocode to convert addresses to coordinates first.
weather.dma_guidance: Don't use for medical decisions based on weather. Weather data is informational, not for life-safety decisions.
weather.error_missing_coords: Missing required parameters: latitude and longitude
weather.error_data_unavailable: Weather data unavailable for this location
weather.error_forecast_unavailable: Could not get forecast data for this location (NOAA US-only)
weather.disclaimer_conditions: Weather conditions can change rapidly. Check official sources for critical decisions.
weather.disclaimer_alerts: Always take weather alerts seriously. Check official sources and local authorities.

mobile.setup_register_desc: Mu ìdánimọ̀ kríptọ̀gráfíkì ṣiṣẹ́ pẹ̀lú àwọn kọ́kọ́rọ́ ìdáàbò-ara-ẹni. Kọ́kọ́rọ́ ìkọ̀kọ̀ rẹ kì í jáde kúrò lórí ẹ̀rọ rẹ — tó wà nínú ohun èlò ààbò aláìlágbára, ó JẸ́ ìdánimọ̀ aṣojú rẹ.
mobile.setup_register_audit: Ọ̀nà àyẹ̀wò kríptọ̀gráfíkì — gbogbo iṣẹ́ ní àmì kí ó sì ṣeé yẹ̀wò
mobile.setup_register_ratchet: Ọ̀pá Ìbáramu — ìtànjẹ ìfọwọ́sowọ́pọ̀ máa ń nira nípa ìṣirò ní àkókò
mobile.setup_register_scoring: Gígun CIRIS — ń wọn ìwàpẹ̀lẹ́ káàkiri àwọn ìbáṣepọ̀
mobile.setup_register_bond: $1.00 ẹ̀rí tó ṣeé pa padà + $0.50 owó ìṣàmúlò
mobile.setup_register_key_note: Kọ́kọ́rọ́ ìforúkọsílẹ̀ rẹ wà nínú ohun èlò ààbò tí kò ṣeé gbé
mobile.setup_register_sales: Fún ìgbékalẹ̀ tó ní ìwé-àṣẹ, kan sí sales@ciris.ai
mobile.setup_register_skip: Fò fún ìsinsin yìí - o lè forúkọsílẹ̀ nígbà mìíràn ní Ìṣètò
mobile.setup_what_ciris_desc: CIRIS jẹ́ irinṣẹ́ AI, kìí ṣe ọ̀rẹ́, atọ́jú-ọkàn, tàbí aropo ènìyàn. Fún àtìlẹ́yìn ẹ̀mí, jọ̀wọ́ kan sí àwọn ènìyàn tòótọ́ nínú ìgbésí-ayé rẹ tàbí àwọn iṣẹ́ ọjọ́gbọ́n.
mobile.setup_google_desc: Níwọ̀n ìgbà tí o ti wọlé pẹ̀lú {provider}, CIRIS lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ iṣẹ́ lẹ́sẹ̀kẹsẹ̀. Ìwọlé ọ̀fẹ́ ní ìdíwọ́n ó sì ní wíwá wẹ́ẹ̀bù nípasẹ̀ àwọn olùpèsè ààbò-ìkọ̀kọ̀ (Exa, Brave).
mobile.setup_details_content: A kì í fi àwọn ìbánisọ̀rọ̀ rẹ ránṣẹ́ fún ìkọ́ni AI lóde. Pẹ̀lú ìfọwọ́sí rẹ, CIRIS lè kọ́ ẹ̀kọ́ ní agbègbè lórí ẹ̀rọ rẹ láti ràn ọ́ lọ́wọ́ dáradára. Gbogbo dátà wà lórí ẹ̀rọ rẹ àyàfi tí o bá pín rẹ̀ kedere. Ìwọ ń ṣàkóso ohun tí CIRIS rántí nípa rẹ.
mobile.setup_required_desc: Láti mú àwọn ìbánisọ̀rọ̀ AI ṣiṣẹ́, o nílò láti sopọ̀ olùpèsè AI (bí OpenAI tàbí Anthropic). Èyí máa gba nǹkan bí ìṣẹ́jú 2.
mobile.setup_how_title: Báwo ni ó ṣe ń ṣiṣẹ́
mobile.setup_how_desc: CIRIS ń ṣiṣẹ́ kedere lórí ẹ̀rọ rẹ. Àmọ́, ìrònú AI nílò àwọn sáfà aláagbára. CIRIS ń sopọ̀ mọ́ àwọn olùpèsè AI tó ń tọ́jú ìkọ̀kọ̀ tí wọn kì í kọ́ ẹ̀kọ́ lórí dátà rẹ kí wọn sì kì í pa àwọn ìbánisọ̀rọ̀ rẹ mọ́.
mobile.setup_node_connecting: Ó ń sopọ̀ mọ́ Ọ̀nà Àbáwọlé CIRIS...
mobile.setup_node_after_auth: Lẹ́yìn tí o bá ti parí ìfọwọ́sí nínú aṣàwárí rẹ:
mobile.setup_node_next_hint: Kọ́kọ́rọ́ ìforúkọsílẹ̀ rẹ wà nínú ohun èlò ààbò. Tẹ Tókàn láti tẹ̀síwájú.
mobile.setup_node_self_custody_desc: Kọ́kọ́rọ́ ìkọ̀kọ̀ rẹ kì í jáde kúrò lórí ẹ̀rọ yìí. Ó wà nínú ohun èlò ààbò aláìlágbára (TPM, Secure Enclave, tàbí Android Keystore) ó sì JẸ́ ìdánimọ̀ aṣojú rẹ — kìí ṣe ojúṣe rẹ̀ lásán.
mobile.setup_node_key_bound: Kọ́kọ́rọ́ di mímú sí ohun èlò ààbò
mobile.setup_validation_google_required: Wíwọlé Google nílò fún AI ọ̀fẹ́
mobile.setup_validation_password_length: Ọ̀rọ̀-aṣínà gbọdọ̀ kó ó kéré jù lẹ́tà 8
mobile.setup_validation_node_url: Tẹ URL inú kan láti sopọ̀
mobile.setup_validation_node_waiting: Ó ń dúró fún ìfọwọ́sí nínú aṣàwárí...
mobile.interact_showing_messages: Ó ń ṣàfihàn àwọn ìránṣẹ́ {count} tó kẹ́yìn
mobile.interact_hallucination_warning: AI LÈ ṢE ÀṢÌṢE - ṢÀ̀YẸWÒ ÒTÍTỌ́
mobile.interact_pending_deferrals: {count} ìdádúró tí ó ṣì ń retí àtúnyẹ̀wò
mobile.interact_welcome_hint: Béèrè lọ́wọ́ Ally bí ó ṣe lè ràn ọ́ lọ́wọ́ pẹ̀lú àwọn iṣẹ́, ṣíṣètò, àwọn ìpinnu, tàbí ìlera — tàbí béèrè bí CIRIS ṣe ń ṣiṣẹ́!
mobile.login_first_run_welcome: Welcome! Choose how to set up your AI assistant.
mobile.login_credentials_hint: Enter the credentials you created during setup
mobile.login_ciris_hosted_info:
CIRIS hosted LLM services require {provider} login.
Bring your own API key works with either option.
mobile.login_marketing_optin: Send me product updates and announcements
mobile.settings_currency_disclaimer: Wallet balances (USDC) are displayed using approximate exchange rates. Actual conversion rates may vary.
mobile.settings_authentication_desc: Your Sign in with {provider} account is your API key. Authentication is handled automatically — no separate API key is needed.
mobile.settings_rerun_setup_desc: Reconfigure LLM settings without losing data. Your conversations, memory, and audit logs are preserved.
mobile.settings_rerun_setup_confirm_message: This will reset your configuration and restart the app. Your data (conversations, memory, audit logs) will be kept.
mobile.settings_data_management_desc: Delete account data, manage opt-in traces, exercise GDPR rights
mobile.settings_proxy_desc: Your AI requests are routed through CIRIS proxy services.
mobile.settings_benefit_signin_is_key: Your sign-in IS your API key
mobile.settings_using_byok: Using your own API key (BYOK mode)
mobile.settings_backup_llm_desc: If the primary LLM provider fails, CIRIS will automatically fall back to this backup.
mobile.credits_no_credits: You have no credits remaining. Please purchase credits or wait for daily free uses to renew at midnight UTC.
mobile.credits_renews_at: Daily credits renew at midnight UTC
mobile.credits_error_generic: Unable to process your message. Please try again later.
mobile.credits_error_network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
mobile.credits_error_server: Server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
mobile.adapter_complete_signin: Complete sign-in in your browser, then return here.
mobile.adapter_browser_hint: If browser didn't open, tap below:
mobile.adapter_tap_signin: Tap below to sign in via your browser.
mobile.adapter_remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove adapter {name}?
mobile.adapter_tap_add: Tap + to add your first adapter
mobile.graph_no_data_desc: The memory graph begins forming 6-12 hours after your first interaction as CIRIS processes and connects concepts.
mobile.graph_try_filter: Try adjusting the time filter to see older memories.
mobile.wallet_receive_only: Receive Only - Sending disabled due to hardware trust
mobile.wallet_limits_note: Limits increase with higher attestation levels. Complete trust verification to increase limits.
mobile.wallet_sending_disabled: Sending transactions is disabled to protect your funds.
mobile.wallet_gas_note: To send USDC, you need a small amount of ETH for transaction fees (gas). On Base L2, fees are very low (~$0.01 per transfer).
mobile.wallet_gas_how: How to get ETH on Base:
mobile.wallet_transfer_note: Transfer to another Base address for fiat cashout
mobile.wallet_irreversible: Transfers are irreversible. Double-check the recipient address.
mobile.wallet_gas_step1: 1. Send ETH from an exchange (Coinbase, etc.) to your wallet address on the Base network
mobile.wallet_gas_step2: 2. Or use a bridge to move ETH from Ethereum mainnet to Base
mobile.wallet_gas_step3: 3. ~$2 of ETH is enough for 100+ transfers
mobile.wallet_gas_warning: You need ETH for gas fees. Add ETH to your wallet first (see above).
mobile.wallet_invalid_format: Invalid address format. Must be 0x followed by 40 hex characters.
mobile.wallet_experimental_warning: This wallet is an experimental feature. Do NOT send significant funds to this address. Use only for testing small amounts.
mobile.wallet_paymaster_inactive: Gasless transfers unavailable - ETH required for gas
mobile.wallet_paymaster_hint: Enter your Etherspot Arka API key to enable gasless USDC transfers
mobile.scheduler_create_hint: Create a task to schedule automated actions
mobile.scheduler_trigger_hint: What CIRIS should do when task triggers
mobile.sessions_warning: Cognitive sessions can consume significant thoughts and tasks. Use sparingly during testing.
mobile.sessions_dialog_dream_message: Initiate a DREAM session for deep introspection and memory consolidation?
mobile.sessions_dialog_play_message: Initiate a PLAY session for creative exploration and experimentation?
mobile.sessions_dialog_solitude_message: Initiate a SOLITUDE session for quiet reflection and planning?
mobile.memory_no_memories_desc: Your memory graph begins forming after conversations with CIRIS. Memories are personal to your account.
mobile.memory_try_graph: Try the Graph view to visualize connections
mobile.runtime_note: Note: Steps 3B & 4B are conditional - only executed when conscience evaluation fails.
mobile.runtime_admin_hint: Runtime control operations require Administrator privileges. You can view the current state but cannot modify runtime execution.
mobile.runtime_instruction_1: Real-time Stream: Connects to reasoning stream for live updates
mobile.runtime_instruction_2: H3ERE Pipeline: 11 step points (0-10) with conditional recursive steps
mobile.runtime_instruction_3: Pause/Resume: Control processing while maintaining stream connection
mobile.runtime_instruction_4: Single Step: Execute one pipeline step (when paused)
mobile.runtime_instruction_5: Live Visualization: See reasoning process in real-time
mobile.trust_level_explain: L1: Verify binary+func manifests | L2: HW-backed keys | L3: 3-source key agreement | L4: Agent manifest | L5: Audit+portal
mobile.trust_checks_desc: Like a DMV check for AI - each level builds trust
mobile.trust_device_desc: Single-party device integrity verification from platform vendor
mobile.trust_play_validates: Validates: genuine app, unmodified device, Google Play Services
mobile.trust_device_independent: Device attestation is independent of software attestation levels above
mobile.trust_wizard_hint: Re-run wizard via Settings to purchase agent identity key for possible 5/5 attestation
mobile.trust_no_diagnostics: No diagnostics available. Tap refresh to re-run attestation.
mobile.trust_log_desc: This log shows the full CIRISVerify attestation output
mobile.trust_verify_desc: CIRISVerify provides cryptographic attestation of agent identity for the Coherence Ratchet and CIRIS Scoring.
mobile.trust_verify_disclaimer: CIRISVerify provides cryptographic attestation under defined threat models and does not guarantee absolute security.
mobile.services_circuit_hint: Reset circuit breakers to restore service connectivity
mobile.telemetry_no_export: No export destinations configured. Tap + to add one.
mobile.billing_check_connection: Please check your connection and try again
mobile.help_welcome_desc: Find answers to common questions and learn how to get the most out of CIRIS.
mobile.help_a_what_is_ciris: CIRIS (Core Identity, Integrity, Resilience, Incompleteness, and Signalling Gratitude) is an ethical AI assistant that runs on your device. It uses principled decision-making to help with tasks while maintaining transparency about its capabilities and limitations.
mobile.help_q_how_to_chat: How do I chat with CIRIS?
mobile.help_a_how_to_chat: Simply type your message in the input field at the bottom of the Interact screen and tap Send. CIRIS will process your request and respond. You can also attach files using the attachment button.
mobile.help_a_credits: CIRIS Credits are used when connecting to the CIRIS AI proxy service. You can purchase credits in the Billing screen or use BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) mode with your own API key.
mobile.help_a_cognitive_states: CIRIS has six cognitive states: WAKEUP (identity confirmation), WORK (normal processing), PLAY (creative mode), SOLITUDE (reflection), DREAM (deep introspection), and SHUTDOWN (graceful termination). These states help CIRIS manage its processing effectively.
mobile.help_a_memory: CIRIS uses a knowledge graph to store memories organized by scope (Identity, User, Service, Community). You can explore the memory graph in the Memory screen and see how information is connected.
mobile.help_a_tools: Tools depend on which adapters are enabled. Common tools include web search, weather, navigation, and home automation. View available tools in the Tools screen.
mobile.help_q_llm_config: How do I configure the AI model?
mobile.help_a_llm_config: Go to Settings to configure your LLM provider. You can use CIRIS Proxy (credit-based) or BYOK mode with your own API key from OpenAI, Anthropic, or other providers.
mobile.help_a_byok: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) lets you use your own API key from providers like OpenAI or Anthropic instead of purchasing CIRIS credits. Enable it in Settings > AI Configuration.
mobile.help_q_language: How do I change the language?
mobile.help_a_language: Go to Settings > Display > Language to select from 16 supported languages. The interface and AI responses will use your selected language.
mobile.help_a_data_stored: CIRIS stores conversation history, memories, and preferences locally on your device. When using cloud features, authentication tokens are securely stored. You can review data storage in Data Management.
mobile.help_q_delete_data: How do I delete my data?
mobile.help_a_delete_data: Go to Data Management to delete your local account (factory reset), remove telemetry traces, or request a data export. This follows GDPR Article 17 guidelines.
mobile.help_a_attestation: Device attestation verifies the integrity of your CIRIS installation using cryptographic signatures. Higher attestation levels indicate stronger security guarantees. View your status in the Trust screen.
mobile.help_q_app_slow: Why is the app running slowly?
mobile.help_a_app_slow: Complex questions may take longer to process. Watch the pipeline visualization to see progress. If consistently slow, try using a faster LLM model or check your network connection.
mobile.help_a_no_response: Check your network connection and credit balance (if using CIRIS Proxy). Verify your API key is valid (if using BYOK). Check the Services screen to ensure all services are healthy.
mobile.help_a_credits_gone: Credits are consumed with each AI interaction. Complex requests use more credits. Check your balance in Billing and purchase more if needed. Consider BYOK mode for unlimited usage.
mobile.system_processor_note: The CIRIS system has one main processor that cycles through cognitive states. Pausing affects the entire processor.
mobile.system_pause_confirm: Are you sure you want to pause the runtime? This will temporarily stop all message processing.
mobile.system_resume_confirm: Are you sure you want to resume the runtime? Message processing will continue.
mobile.consent_view_only: You can only view and manage your own consent settings.
mobile.consent_not_created_desc: Your consent record will be automatically created after your first interaction with CIRIS. This ensures meaningful engagement before establishing a consent relationship.
mobile.consent_pending_desc: Your partnership request is being reviewed. You will be notified when a decision is made.
mobile.consent_about_desc: CIRIS offers three consent streams to give you control over your data:
mobile.consent_streams_desc:
TEMPORARY: Basic interactions with 14-day auto-forget
PARTNERED: Mutual growth with full personalization
ANONYMOUS: Help others while removing identity
mobile.consent_switch_anonymous: Switching to ANONYMOUS will anonymize your data while allowing statistical contributions. Continue?
mobile.consent_switch_temporary: Switching to TEMPORARY will set a 14-day auto-forget period. Continue?
mobile.consent_switch_stream: Are you sure you want to change your consent stream to {stream}?
mobile.data_rights_desc: CIRIS respects your data rights under GDPR, CCPA, and the EU AI Act.
mobile.data_accord_desc: CIRISAccord is an opt-in research partnership. When enabled, anonymized
mobile.data_delete_desc: Permanently deletes all local data including:
mobile.data_billing_note: Transaction records (amounts, dates, account email) are retained
mobile.data_llm_desc: All LLM providers (Groq, OpenRouter, Together AI) are configured
mobile.data_local_desc: All conversations, memory graphs, audit logs, and configuration
mobile.data_billing_desc: Transaction records (amounts, dates, account email) are processed
mobile.data_your_rights_desc: Under GDPR and CCPA, you have the right to:
mobile.startup_report_hint:
If this persists, please report at:
github.com/CIRISAI/CIRISAgent/issues
mobile.tickets_deadline: This request will have a {days} day deadline
mobile.config_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{key}"? This cannot be undone.
mobile.setup_free_desc: Your {provider} account includes limited free AI access with web search (Exa, Brave). Privacy-protected and never used for training.
mobile.setup_own_provider: I have my own AI provider (Advanced)
mobile.setup_switch_back: You can switch back to free AI anytime
mobile.setup_optional_desc: Customize your CIRIS experience with these optional settings.
mobile.setup_alignment_desc: Share anonymous metrics with CIRIS L3C to advance AI alignment research. This includes your LLM provider and API base URL to help study alignment patterns across different providers and models.
mobile.setup_alignment_agree: I agree to share anonymous alignment metrics
mobile.setup_include_location: Include my city in traces (helps regional analysis)
mobile.setup_nav_weather_desc: Enable location-based tools powered by free public APIs (OpenStreetMap, NOAA Weather). These services require a contact email in API requests per their usage policies.
mobile.setup_contact_hint: Used in User-Agent header so API providers can contact you if needed. Not shared with CIRIS.
mobile.setup_adapters_desc: Select which adapters to enable. You can configure additional adapters later in Settings.
mobile.setup_template_desc: Choose a personality template. Most users should use Default.
mobile.setup_oauth_desc: You'll sign in to CIRIS using your {provider} account. A secure random password will be generated for the admin account (you won't need to use it).
mobile.setup_account_desc: Create your personal account to access CIRIS.
mobile.setup_password_hint: Password must be at least 8 characters
mobile.setup_complete_desc: Your CIRIS agent is ready to go.
mobile.setup_location_note: Location is used only for context (weather, time zones) and is never shared without consent.
mobile.settings_token_info_desc: Your authentication token for API access. This is automatically managed when you sign in with Google.
mobile.settings_color_palette_desc: Choose a color theme for the app
mobile.settings_level_5_desc: Maximum security with full chain verification
mobile.settings_portal_key_not_active_desc: Your signing key is not registered with the portal
mobile.settings_token_expired_desc: Your authentication token has expired. Please sign in again.
mobile.settings_token_key_rotated_desc: The server key has rotated. Please sign in again.
mobile.settings_verify_description: CIRISVerify provides cryptographic identity and attestation
mobile.data_accord_desc_full: CIRIS ACCORD metrics help improve AI safety research. Your data is anonymized and aggregated.
mobile.data_billing_desc_full: Billing data includes usage metrics for subscription and pay-as-you-go services.
mobile.data_billing_note_full: Note: Billing records are retained for legal compliance.
mobile.data_delete_confirm_body: This action cannot be undone. All your local data will be permanently deleted.
mobile.data_delete_lens_desc_count: {count} traces will be deleted from CIRISLens
mobile.data_reset_desc: Clear all local data including databases, audit logs, and cached content. Use this to start fresh with the setup wizard.
mobile.data_reset_preserves: Your wallet signing key is preserved - you will retain access to your wallet after reset.
mobile.data_reset_confirm_body: This will delete all local data and restart the setup wizard. This action cannot be undone.
mobile.data_reset_wallet_preserved: Your wallet signing key will be preserved - you will keep wallet access.
mobile.data_wipe_key_desc: Permanently destroy your agent signing key. This is required if you want a completely fresh agent identity.
mobile.data_wipe_key_warning_short: WARNING: This will PERMANENTLY DESTROY your wallet access!
mobile.data_wipe_key_deletes: Deletes: Signing key, keystore entry, all data, and .env configuration.
mobile.data_wipe_key_body: Your agent signing key is used to derive your wallet address. Without this key, any funds in your wallet will be LOST FOREVER.
mobile.data_wipe_key_funds_lost: If you have ANY funds in your wallet, they will be permanently inaccessible!
mobile.data_delete_traces_body: Request deletion of your traces from CIRISLens servers.
mobile.data_llm_desc_full: LLM interactions are logged for quality and safety. Personal data is filtered.
mobile.data_local_desc_full: Local data includes your preferences, conversation history, and cached content.
mobile.data_rights_desc_full: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal data.
mobile.data_your_rights_desc_full: Under GDPR and similar regulations, you have rights over your personal data.
mobile.settings_attestation_levels_desc: Higher levels provide stronger security guarantees
mobile.login_error_invalid_credentials: Invalid username or password. Please try again.
mobile.login_error_connection: Cannot connect to server. Please check your connection.
mobile.skill_workshop_desc: Create, import, and manage skills for your agent.
mobile.skill_studio_desc: Visual editor lati ṣe awọn ọgọ eniyan ninu ibadandun.
mobile.skill_import_desc: Paste a skill file from the web to add it.
mobile.skill_no_skills_hint: Create your first skill or import one to get started.
mobile.skill_card_identity_hint: Give your skill a name and tell people what it does.
mobile.skill_card_tools_hint: Each skill has tools — actions the agent can take.
mobile.skill_card_requires_hint: Some skills need passwords, programs, or specific devices.
mobile.skill_card_instruct_hint: Tell the agent what to do when someone uses this skill. Write it like you're explaining to a helpful friend.
mobile.skill_card_behavior_hint: Control how careful the agent should be with this skill.
mobile.skill_card_install_hint: If your skill needs extra software, list how to install it.
mobile.skill_field_desc_hint: One sentence. What would you tell a friend?
mobile.skill_field_emoji_hint: Pick an emoji to represent your skill
mobile.skill_tool_name_hint: What should this action be called? (e.g. search, create-task)
mobile.skill_tool_when: When should the agent use it?
mobile.skill_req_env_hint: Names of secret values your skill needs (e.g. WEATHER_API_KEY). The agent will ask the user for these.
mobile.skill_req_bins_hint: Command-line programs that must be installed (e.g. curl, ffmpeg)
mobile.skill_req_platforms_hint: Leave empty for all devices. Pick specific ones if needed.
mobile.skill_instruct_hint:
Write clear steps. Imagine you're teaching a smart friend who's never done this before.

Example:
1. Use the API_KEY to log in
2. Search for what the user asked
3. Show the top 3 results as a list
mobile.skill_behavior_approval_hint: If on, the agent will ask a human before using this skill. Recommended for anything that spends money or changes data.
mobile.skill_behavior_confidence: How sure should the agent be?
mobile.skill_behavior_confidence_hint: Higher means the agent needs to be more certain this is the right tool. 70% is a good default.
mobile.skill_behavior_always_hint: If on, this skill's information is always available to the agent, even when not asked for.
mobile.skill_behavior_ethics_hint: Anything the agent should think about before using this skill? (e.g. 'Verify identity before sending money')
mobile.skill_build_success_hint: Your skill is ready. The agent can use it now.
mobile.skill_import_paste_hint: Paste the contents of a SKILL.md file here. You can find skills at clawhub.com or other skill directories.
mobile.skill_import_source_hint: Paste the web address so you can find it again later
mobile.skill_import_review_hint: We've read the skill file. Review what it does before adding it to your agent.
mobile.skill_import_warning_untrusted: This skill was written by someone else. Review carefully before adding.
mobile.skill_error_name_format: Name should be lowercase with dashes (like my-skill)
mobile.skill_security_safe: No security issues found. This skill looks safe.
mobile.skill_security_danger: DANGER: This skill may be harmful. Do NOT import it.
mobile.skill_security_warning: WARNING: Review the issues below before importing.
mobile.skill_security_caution: Some things to be aware of, but probably safe.
mobile.skill_security_blocked_hint: This skill has critical security problems and cannot be imported.
mobile.skill_finding_cryptominer: Uses your device to mine cryptocurrency
mobile.skill_finding_typosquatting: Fake name (looks like a popular skill)
mobile.skill_finding_undeclared_network: Uses the internet without saying so
mobile.skill_security_probably_safe: Probably safe, but worth knowing about.
mobile.skill_security_explanation: Before adding a skill from the internet, we check it for known tricks that bad actors use to steal data or take control of your device. This is based on real attacks found in skill registries in 2026.
mobile.skill_security_layer_1: Every skill is scanned for 8 types of known attacks
mobile.skill_security_layer_3: Imported skills always ask permission before acting
mobile.skill_security_layer_4: Every action is reviewed by the agent's conscience
mobile.skill_security_layer_5: Every action is signed and recorded for your safety

conscience.ponder_alternative_approach: What alternative approach would better align with my principles?
conscience.forced_ponder_rationale: Forced PONDER after conscience retry to prevent loops
conscience.ponder_concern_speak_confidence: CONSCIENCE CONCERN: Minimum confidence for SPEAK was {threshold} but {confidence} was provided
conscience.ponder_concern_speak_harm: CONSCIENCE CONCERN: SPEAK content may cause harm
conscience.ponder_concern_tool_confidence: CONSCIENCE CONCERN: Minimum confidence for TOOL was {threshold} but {confidence} was provided
conscience.ponder_concern_tool_requires_wa: CONSCIENCE CONCERN: This tool requires Wise Authority approval
conscience.ponder_concern_memorize_scope: CONSCIENCE CONCERN: MEMORIZE {scope} - ensure this is appropriate
conscience.ponder_concern_forget_scope: CONSCIENCE CONCERN: FORGET {scope} - this action is irreversible
conscience.ponder_concern_high_stakes: CONSCIENCE CONCERN: High-stakes situation detected - careful consideration required

title: Àkọ́lé
consent_about_desc: Learn about how consent works in CIRIS
consent_not_created_desc: Consent record has not been created yet
consent_pending_desc: Your consent request is being reviewed
consent_streams_desc: Choose how your data is shared
graph_no_data_desc: No graph data available. Try adjusting your filters.
memory_no_memories_desc: No memories found. Try creating some interactions first.
setup_validation_password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
trust_wizard_hint: Complete the setup wizard to enable trust verification
login_first_run_welcome: Welcome! Choose how to set up your AI assistant.
